mnemonics: PETERSON'S PROMISE: Process Entering Threatens Everyone's Resources, So Observe Nice Sequencing (for Peterson's solution ensuring mutual exclusion and progress)
keyPoints: Ucks two shared variables: 'turn' and a 'flag[]' array to indicate a process's desire to enter its critical section.
Ensures mutual exclusion by allowing only one process at a time to enter the critical section.
Guarantees progress and bounded waiting by letting processes take turns fairly.
commonMistakes: Forgetting to set the 'flag' for the current process before setting 'turn' to the other process, which can lead to a deadlock.
Assuming the solution works for more than two processes; it is strictly designed for two processes only.
